notes: v1.7.5 — APP ICON SWAP to the circuit-ghost (operator decision). Replaces the v1.7.4 SVG-authored ghost icon with an AI-authored circuit-board ghost raster. This DELIBERATELY REVERSES v1.7.4's first invariant ('NOT an AI image; master is SVG'): the operator weighed the flagged tradeoffs (AI-raster not token-SVG; muddies at small sizes; a draped sheet-ghost vs the app's clean three-scallop glyph) and chose it anyway. NEW ICON SOURCE: ghost.webp (1024x1024, opaque) committed to the repo — the source of truth now, regenerated via sharp in tools/render-icons.js (the old resvg/SVG icon path is retired). Re-rendered the 6 PNGs (same filenames, so manifest.json + head wiring are UNCHANGED): apple-touch-icon.png(180, flattened opaque RGB), icon-192.png, icon-512.png, favicon-32.png, favicon-16.png, icon-512-maskable.png (ghost padded into the central ~80% safe zone on a dark full-bleed canvas). Removed the now-obsolete SVG icon masters icon.svg / icon-maskable.svg / favicon.svg; KEPT og.svg (the OG link card still uses the authored .ico-ghost + Audiowide wordmark — NOT changed this cut). GATE NOTES (rendered + eyeballed): 60px reads as a glowing ghost with eyes (circuit detail drops out but the silhouette + eyes carry it); maskable safe-zone OK; favicon-16 is SOFT/mushy (a dark glow blob — inherent to a detailed raster at 16px, the tradeoff the operator accepted). OFFERED FOLLOW-UPS (not done this cut): keep the crisp authored-SVG glyph for favicon-16/32 only (hybrid) if mushy tab favicons bother; and align the OG card hero to the circuit-ghost for brand consistency. WIRING unchanged (same PNG filenames; no app CSS/JS logic touched). node --check 2/2 + sw.js OK, manifest + version JSON valid, block-0 braces unchanged at 2566, three stamps v1.7.5. Built on c7c54b3 (v1.7.4). ON-DEVICE (John): iOS will NOT refresh an installed PWA icon in place — REMOVE the home-screen app and RE-ADD it to see the circuit-ghost.
